name: A. b. c. Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in brown sugar and bring mixture to a boil. Turn off heat.
3. Allow mixture to cool for about 5-10 minutes, then rapidly stir in eggs, being careful not to cook them further.
4. Add vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking powder.
6. Gradually mix the flour mixture into the sugar-egg blend.
7. Pour the batter into a greased pan.
